summary: Successfully completed comprehensive testing of LaCleo.ai after SelectItem component fix. All critical dashboard functionality now working perfectly. Backend APIs maintain 100% success rate, and the previously crashing Dashboard component is fully operational.
passed_tests: Backend: All 9 API endpoints working (health, auth/register, auth/login, auth/me, lead generation, lead retrieval, stats, enrichment, search history)
Dashboard loads successfully after authentication (SelectItem fix confirmed working)
Industry filter dropdown works without errors - successfully selected SaaS option
Lead generation with search prompt works - input accepts prompts, Generate Leads button functional
Lead table displays with proper data - shows 10 leads with complete company information
Company enrichment dialog opens correctly - modal displays enriched data
Export CSV functionality works - download triggered successfully (lacleo_leads_2026-02-23.csv)
User menu and logout functionality works - properly redirects to login after logout
Authentication flow works with provided test credentials (test1771853932@example.com)
Stats cards display correctly - shows Total Leads: 20, Searches: 2, Avg Score: 73.5, Industries: 5
Search history shows recent searches correctly
Lead scoring system displays color-coded scores properly
Mocked AI integrations (Kimi AI lead generation, Clearbit enrichment) working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - Dashboard fully operational, SelectItem fix successful
